info.description:
API для информационной системы академического секретаря/методиста.
Включает управление документами, расписанием, задачами, уведомлениями и мессенджером.
info.title: Inf-Sys Secretary-Methodist API

Apply the current actor's cryptographic signature to the document's current version. Students are not allowed to sign.

get.description: List all signatures applied to a document.
Re-check a stored signature against the document's current state. digest_match flags a changed document body; crypto_valid flags signature validity.
